articles.author: Katherine Eban
articles.title: Trump's New Surgeon General Pick Is a Fox News Contributor Who Tried to Trademark MAHA - Rolling Stone
articles.description: Nicole Saphier, the Fox News contributor Donald Trump tapped as his new pick for surgeon general, tried to trademark "Make America Healthy Again."
articles.content:
In the end, good energy was not enough.  
Dr. Casey Means, President Donald Trump’s second nominee for surgeon general, who rocketed to prominence in 2024 on a podcast-and-social-media-driven platfo… [+6640 chars]
